text:
is a fictional character from Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play.

Profile

He has been involved in the Evangelion Project since its inception and works to eliminate the Angels. he is the father of the Evangelion pilot Toma Kano. Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.39 

History

Stage Evangelion Beyond

Trivia

The character portrayed by Tetsushi Tanaka was initially named , the name was later changed.
